messages.content:
You are the Historian Agent generating a Coverage Plan for proposal verification.

**Your Task:** Given these extracted claims, determine which specification sections MUST be consulted to ensure complete verification. This defines what "thorough verification" means for this proposal.

**Claims from Proposal (PROP-2026-001):**

C1: Feature detection will use OpenCV ORB instead of SuperPoint (CRITICAL)
C2: Feature matching will use cv::BFMatcher instead of SuperGlue (CRITICAL)
C3: maxFeaturesPerImage will be set to 1000 (vs spec: 2000) (CRITICAL)
C4: enableSubPixelRefinement will be disabled (vs spec: true) (CRITICAL)
C5: Feature detection target: < 100ms per image (vs spec: < 200ms)
C6: Feature matching target: < 150ms per pair (vs spec: < 300ms)
C7: Memory usage target: < 100MB (vs spec: < 150MB)
C8: SDK size will be reduced by 6.7MB
C9: No Core ML integration needed

**Assumptions:**
A1: ORB feature quality sufficient for SfM/MVS (HIGH RISK)
A2: Brute-force matching speed acceptable (HIGH RISK)
A3: ±2mm accuracy achievable with ORB (HIGH RISK)

**Document Context:**
The proposal targets the Feature Detection System in the "Photorealistic 3D Scanning SDK - Technical Specification" document.

**Response Format:**

```json
{
  "proposal_id": "PROP-2026-001",
  "expected_sections": [
    {
      "id": "S1",
      "section_title": "<section name from spec>",
      "node_id": "<if known, the section identifier>",
      "reason": "<why this section must be checked>",
      "related_claims": ["C1", "C2"],
      "mandatory": true | false
    }
  ],
  "must_check_invariants": [
    "<fundamental requirements that must always hold>"
  ],
  "critical_claims": ["C1", "C2", "C3", "C4"],
  "coverage_threshold": 0.95,
  "notes": "<strategy for verification>"
}
```

**Guidelines:**
- Include the obvious: Feature Detection System section
- Include related systems: Performance Requirements, Configuration, Technical Architecture
- Consider ML Models section (since proposal removes ML models)
- Consider accuracy/measurement sections (since assumptions affect accuracy)
- Mark sections as mandatory if omitting them would miss critical issues
- Set coverage_threshold high (0.95) since this involves critical spec changes

Return only valid JSON.
